def positive_upstream_response_not_checked_before_decode():
    rule_id = "upstream_response_not_checked_before_decode"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Handlers decode upstream responses without visible status checks such as raise_for_status() or status_code guards."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
